theory.canonical_statement: ID3683 records Matching Outer Gas Giant Resonance Causes Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\emergent_matter_thz.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ (matching the outer gas giant resonance) causes the random noise to spontaneously organize into coherent, ripple-like structures. \begin{figure}[H] \centering \includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{trawin_shadow_analysis.png} \caption{The Trawin Shadow Effect.
